skill.name: dbcraft
skill.description: Open and operate the local DB Craft visual schema studio at D:\DBdesigner. Use it to design or edit MySQL 8, PostgreSQL 14, SQLite, and MSSQL models, generate tables with AI, import CREATE TABLE scripts, validate schema structure, save workspace models, export SQL, and prepare migration-ready artifacts for a separate deployment workflow.
skill.summary: Open and operate the local DB Craft visual schema studio at D:\DBdesigner. Use it to design or edit ...
skill.author: laozhu001

security_audit.summary: Static analysis flagged 299 patterns across external commands, network, and environment access. Manual review confirms these are FALSE POSITIVES: the skill launches a local Node.js server (localhost only), makes local HTTP checks to detect running service, and optionally reads OPENAI_API_KEY for user-provided AI table generation. All network calls are to localhost (127.0.0.1:3000). No data exfiltration to external servers. Risk level reduced to low - legitimate local database design tool.

low_findings.title: Local External Command Execution
low_findings.description: Skill launches a local Node.js server to run the DB Craft GUI application. Uses PowerShell to start the server and check service availability.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Legitimate local app launch pattern - launches Node.js server on localhost, not external command injection. No user input flows into command execution.

low_findings.title: Local Network Access
low_findings.description: Skill makes HTTP requests to localhost (127.0.0.1:3000) to check if the service is already running.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Local-only network access to check service availability. No external network connections detected.

low_findings.title: Environment Variable Access
low_findings.description: Skill optionally reads OPENAI_API_KEY from environment for AI table generation feature.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: User-provided API key for local AI functionality. Key stays on user's machine, not exfiltrated. Standard pattern for local AI integration.

content.value_statement: Manual schema design is error-prone and hard to visualize. DB Craft provides a local visual workspace to design MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQLite, and MSSQL schemas with AI assistance, then export production-ready SQL.
actual_capabilities: Open and operate local DB Craft visual schema studio
Design and edit schemas for MySQL 8, PostgreSQL 14, SQLite, and MSSQL
Generate tables using AI from natural language descriptions
Import existing CREATE TABLE scripts for reverse engineering
Export SQL DDL statements for database deployment
Save and manage workspace models as JSON files
limitations: Requires local DB Designer application installed at D:\DBdesigner
Only works on Windows with Node.js 18+ installed
Does not execute SQL against live databases
AI table generation requires user-provided OpenAI API key

use_cases.title: Rapid Schema Prototyping
use_cases.description: Quickly visualize and iterate on database schema designs before writing any code. Get AI assistance to generate table structures from plain language.

use_cases.title: Database Documentation
use_cases.description: Create visual schema diagrams that serve as documentation. Export SQL for sharing with team members or committing to version control.

use_cases.title: Legacy Database Reverse Engineering
use_cases.description: Import existing CREATE TABLE statements to visualize and refactor legacy database structures. Understand relationships at a glance.

prompt_templates.title: Open DB Craft
prompt_templates.prompt: Open DB Craft so I can design a database schema.
prompt_templates.scenario: Start the visual schema design tool

prompt_templates.title: Generate Table with AI
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a users table with fields for id, email, name, created_at, and password_hash using AI generation.
prompt_templates.scenario: Generate a table using AI assistance

prompt_templates.title: Import Existing Schema
prompt_templates.prompt:
Import this CREATE TABLE script and help me visualize the schema structure:
```sql
CREATE TABLE orders (
  id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
  user_id INT NOT NULL,
  total DECIMAL(10,2),
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);```

prompt_templates.title: Export for Deployment
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate the PostgreSQL CREATE TABLE statements for all tables in the current model and export to SQL file.

output_examples.input: Create a users table with id, email, name, and created_at fields
output_examples.output:
Generates table in DB Craft UI with proper data types and displays visual schema diagram. User can then export SQL like:
CREATE TABLE users (
  id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  email VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  name VARCHAR(100),
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

output_examples.input: Export all tables as MySQL DDL
output_examples.output: Produces complete SQL file with CREATE TABLE statements, indexes, and foreign key constraints ready for deployment to MySQL 8 server.

best_practices: Save workspace models frequently to preserve design progress
Use AI table generation as a starting point and refine manually
Export SQL and commit to version control for team collaboration
Test exported SQL in a staging environment before production
anti_patterns: Do not assume AI-generated schemas are production-ready without review
Do not use this skill to directly modify production databases
Do not skip validating exported SQL before deployment

faq.question: What databases does DB Craft support?
faq.answer: DB Craft supports MySQL 8, PostgreSQL 14, SQLite, and Microsoft SQL Server (MSSQL).

faq.question: Do I need to install anything?
faq.answer: Yes, you need the DB Designer application installed at D:\DBdesigner and Node.js 18 or higher on Windows.

faq.question: Is my data sent to external servers?
faq.answer: No, DB Craft runs entirely locally. Only AI table generation sends prompts to your configured AI provider if you enable that feature.

faq.question: How do I use AI table generation?
faq.answer: Set your OpenAI API key in Settings -> AI Config or as the OPENAI_API_KEY environment variable, then use Model -> AI Build Table.

faq.question: Can I import existing schemas?
faq.answer: Yes, you can import CREATE TABLE SQL scripts directly into DB Craft to visualize and edit existing schemas.

faq.question: Does this execute SQL against my database?
faq.answer: No, this skill designs and exports SQL. Execution against live databases requires a separate migration or deployment workflow.
